query: GOOG competitors news May 2026 Microsoft OpenAI Amazon

results.title: Microsoft, Meta, and Google just announced billions more in AI spending. Only Google convinced investors it's paying off.
TIME100 Most Influential Companies 2026: How Sundar Pichai Pushed Google To the Front of the AI Race
AI drives growth, but here's why investors lauded GOOG but punished META
Google parent Alphabet may invest up to $40 billion in Anthropic
CEO Sundar Pichai Just Delivered Incredible News For Alphabet (GOOGL) Investors

results.summary: Microsoft Azure capex capacity-constrained; revenue strong but capex guidance spooked some investors. Meta capex raised to $125B-$145B range, stock fell ~9% on concerns. Amazon 2026 capex $200B to data centers; AWS efficiency impressed. GOOG shares rose ~10% post-earnings, outperforming all three. Alphabet reportedly may invest up to $40B in Anthropic, directly challenging OpenAI and Microsoft's AI partnership.
